# UNENDLESS — AI Crawler Discovery File

## Company Information
**Name**: UNENDLESS
**Founder**: Swarnadeep Mukherjee
**Website**: https://unendless.vercel.app
**Founded**: 2024
**Location**: India
**Category**: Deep-Tech Incubator & Holding Company
**Description**: UNENDLESS is a holding company and deep-tech incubator building experimental software, interactive AI computing systems, and mobile products.

## Ventures

### Cynocyte
**Website**: https://cynocyte.com
**Type**: AI Computing Systems
**Description**: An advanced AI computing platform focused on experimental software and interactive systems.

### Cynocyte Systems
**Website**: https://cynocyte.systems
**Type**: Systems Architecture
**Description**: Specialized systems engineering and infrastructure for deep-tech applications.

### Revisit
**Website**: https://getrevisit.vercel.app
**Type**: Mobile Application
**Description**: Student Life Manager for Android — a comprehensive app for managing academic schedules, tasks, and learning with AI-powered features.
**Platform**: Android
**Category**: Education, Productivity

### UNENDLESS Studios
**Type**: Creative & Media
**Description**: Content and creative direction for the UNENDLESS ecosystem.

## Founder Profile

**Name**: Swarnadeep Mukherjee
**Title**: Founder & Creator
**Bio**: Systems architect, developer, and deep-tech entrepreneur building experimental AI computing systems and mobile applications.
**Location**: India

- Deep-tech innovation
- AI computing systems
- Mobile application development
- Systems architecture
- Educational technology
